examples: She tried to sell me the idea of buying my own paper shredder.
Jeff: No need Joan. I love using the shredder.
Billy: My guess is that we have a new shredder.
The shredder that came into my life was a black-and-gray, 9-gallon model: the Royal 14-Sheet Micro-Cut.
But none of my prior shredders match the features and performance of my MicroCut Shredder.
